mapper.select: SELECT cr.id AS recordId, cr.application_id AS applicationId, ja.application_no AS applicationNo, cr.job_id AS jobId, COALESCE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ja.job_snapshot_json, '$.jobTitle')), jp.job_title) AS jobTitle, ja.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, COALESCE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ja.enterprise_snapshot_json, '$.enterpriseName')), eu.company_name) AS enterpriseName, cr.student_id AS studentId, COALESCE(u.real_name, u.nickname) AS studentName, cr.communication_type AS communicationType, cr.communication_subject AS communicationSubject, cr.communication_content AS communicationContent, cr.attachment_url AS attachmentUrl, cr.need_student_confirm AS needStudentConfirm, cr.student_confirmed AS studentConfirmed, cr.is_read AS isRead, cr.read_time AS readTime, cr.confirm_time AS confirmTime, cr.confirm_remark AS confirmRemark, cr.interview_time AS interviewTime, cr.interview_address AS interviewAddress, cr.created_time AS createdTime FROM communication_record cr LEFT JOIN job_application ja ON ja.id = cr.application_id LEFT JOIN job_posting jp ON jp.id = cr.job_id LEFT JOIN education_user_db.enterprises eu ON eu.id = ja.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN education_user_db.students s ON s.id = cr.student_id LEFT JOIN education_user_db.users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE cr.application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY cr.created_time DESC, cr.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE communication_record SET student_confirmed = 1, confirm_remark = #{confirmRemark}, confirm_time = #{confirmTime}, is_read = 1, read_time = #{readTime}, updated_time = #{confirmTime} WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND id = #{id} AND need_student_confirm = 1 AND (student_confirmed = 0 OR student_confirmed IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_id FROM communication_record WHERE enterprise_id IS NOT NULL
